mapper.select: SELECT post_id, p.user_id as user_id, title, content, views, likes, p.created_at as created_at, u.email as email FROM posts as p LEFT JOIN users as u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE is_deleted IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.views, p.likes, p.created_at, u.email as email FROM ( SELECT * FROM posts WHERE is_deleted IS NULL AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord},'%') AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord},'%') AND 1 = 1 ) AS p LEFT JOIN users AS u ON p.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageAmount} OFFSET #{startPostNum}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE is_deleted IS NULL AND title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{serachWord},'%') AND content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{serachWord},'%') AND 1 = 1

SELECT post_id, p.user_id as user_id, title, content, views, likes, updated_at, p.created_at as created_at, u.email as email FROM posts as p LEFT JOIN users as u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE post_id = #{post_id} AND is_deleted IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET is_deleted=now() WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = now() WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
UPDATE posts SET views = views + 1 WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
